item.title: @elonmusk: Most AI models hallucinate more than you'd think and make up stuff that doesn't exist Grok 4.20 just...
item.description: Most AI models hallucinate more than you'd think and make up stuff that doesn't exist Grok 4.20 just ranked #1 in Non-Hallucination Rate with a 78% score - beating Claude Opus 4.6(max), Gemini 3.1, GPT-5.4(xhigh), and every other model on the list xAI is quietly winning the accuracy game… and it’s built to be truthful

item.title: @elonmusk: Just a few years ago, the only tourists in El Salvador were surfers in beach towns. Going to downtow...
item.description: Just a few years ago, the only tourists in El Salvador were surfers in beach towns. Going to downtown San Salvador at night? Unthinkable, even for locals.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla Cybertruck is the only pickup to be awarded top safety+
item.description: Tesla Cybertruck is the only pickup to be awarded top safety+

item.title: @elonmusk: Didn't drive her car at an ICE agent. Didn't try to obstruct an ICE operation. Was just walking down...
item.description: Didn't drive her car at an ICE agent. Didn't try to obstruct an ICE operation. Was just walking down the street when an illegal alien killed her in cold blood. And Democrats do not care.

item.title: @elonmusk: Hey literally said out of HIS OWN MOUTH, the people they care about most are illegal aliens.. This i...
item.description: Hey literally said out of HIS OWN MOUTH, the people they care about most are illegal aliens.. This is the Democrat party of today. His social contract is with citizens. Not illegal aliens, but here we are…

item.title: @elonmusk: Anna Paulina Luna: "I have enough evidence to believe both Governor Tim Walz and Keith Ellison were ...
item.description: Anna Paulina Luna: "I have enough evidence to believe both Governor Tim Walz and Keith Ellison were knowingly complicit in a Somali fraud scheme in Minnesota. Therefore I have referred them BOTH to the DOJ for criminal charges. May justice be swift."

item.title: @elonmusk: Joe Rogan really bet Elon Musk $1 that he could pierce the Cybertruck with his compound bow it liter...
item.description: Joe Rogan really bet Elon Musk $1 that he could pierce the Cybertruck with his compound bow it literally exploded against the stainless steel exoskeleton and it barely scratched it 😂

item.title: @elonmusk: Here's my conversation with Jensen Huang, CEO of NVIDIA, the most valuable & one of the most influen...
item.description: Here's my conversation with Jensen Huang, CEO of NVIDIA, the most valuable & one of the most influential companies in the history of human civilization. It is the engine powering the AI revolution. This was a fascinating & inspiring conversation, in parts super-technical on engineering of every part of the AI stack, memory, power, supply chain (TSMC, ASML, etc), in parts about leadership & psychology, and in parts personal & philosophical about life, consciousness, mortality, and human nature. It's here on X in full and is up everywhere else (see comment). Timestamps: 0:00 - Introduction 0:33 - Extreme co-design and rack-scale engineering 3:18 - How Jensen runs NVIDIA 22:40 - AI scaling laws 37:40 - Biggest blockers to AI scaling laws 39:23 - Supply chain 41:18 - Memory 47:24 - Power 52:43 - Elon and Colossus 56:11 - Jensen's approach to engineering and leadership 1:01:37 - China 1:09:50 - TSMC and Taiwan 1:15:04 - NVIDIA's moat 1:20:41 - AI data centers in space 1:24:30 - Will NVIDIA be worth $10 trillion? 1:34:39 - Leadership under pressure 1:48:25 - Video games 1:55:16 - AGI timeline 1:57:29 - Future of programming 2:11:01 - Consciousness 2:17:22 - Mortality

item.title: @elonmusk: The Cybertruck rear bench has three sets of isofix attachments and is wide enough to fit three child...
item.description: The Cybertruck rear bench has three sets of isofix attachments and is wide enough to fit three child seats or three adults

item.title: @elonmusk: Analysis finds OVER HALF of immigrant households in America are on welfare - 53% of immigrant-headed...
item.description: Analysis finds OVER HALF of immigrant households in America are on welfare - 53% of immigrant-headed households use welfare - 61% for illegal immigrant households are on welfare Even crazier, it’s been discovered illegals can have a kid, then that kid qualifies them for housing “Most of that welfare use is coming to their US -born children, to illegal immigrant-headed households. So you have a parent or 2 parents who are here illegally, but they have children who are born here, and that's very common. And those are U.S citizen children. They're entitled to welfare all sorts of benefits. Food, school, lunch programs, food stamps, even housing assistance can go to those U.S citizen children. And so of course that that floats the whole family.”

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING A Minnesota election judge plead guilty to allowing 11 unregistered people to vote in Novem...
item.description: BREAKING A Minnesota election judge plead guilty to allowing 11 unregistered people to vote in November 2024. This is the same state that allows 1 registered voter to vouch for up to 8 persons without an ID. Pass the SAVE America Act!

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go t...
item.description: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go to space, as US electricity is only 0.5TW
